user_task: Generate a GROMACS workflow to center a trajectory in the simulation box.
required_input_files: trajectory file such as .xtc when required
run input file such as .tpr when required
energy file such as .edr when required

workflow.topology_check: Verify that topol.top exists and that the [ molecules ] section matches the coordinate file.
workflow.command_sequence: echo Protein System | gmx trjconv -s md.tpr -f md.xtc -o md_center.xtc -center -pbc mol

validation_note: Generated outputs must be checked for successful execution and physical meaning. Short trajectories should be treated as workflow-validation tests unless production-scale sampling is used.
